message:
🌱 Simplify contributor messages and add console/marketplace/KB links (#125)

Update reusable greeting, feedback, and assignment-helper workflows to:
- Replace verbose multi-section messages with concise versions
- Add links to KubeStellar Console, Marketplace, and Knowledge Base
- Fix docs URL (docs.kubestellar.io -> kubestellar.io/docs)
- Remove outdated survey-heavy pitches from greeting/feedback messages

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -58,18 +58,9 @@ jobs:
               console.log('Assignment request detected in comment');
 
               const contributingUrl = '${{ inputs.contributing_guide_url }}';
-              const responseMessage = `👋 Hi @${commenter}!
+              const responseMessage = `Hi @${commenter}! To assign yourself, use the slash command: \`/assign\` (and \`/unassign\` to remove).
 
-            To assign yourself to this issue, please use the slash command:
-            \`\`\`
-            /assign
-            \`\`\`
-
-            This will automatically assign the issue to you via our Prow bot. You can also use \`/unassign\` to remove yourself from an issue.
-
-            📚 For more information about contributing, please check out our [Contributors Guide](${contributingUrl}).
-
-            Thank you for your interest in contributing to KubeStellar! 🚀`;
+            **Resources:** [Contributors Guide](${contributingUrl}) | [Console Docs](https://kubestellar.io/docs/console/overview/introduction) | [Knowledge Base](https://kubestellar.io/docs/console/programs/knowledge-base)`;
 
               await github.rest.issues.createComment({
                 owner,

@@ -24,18 +24,11 @@ jobs:
           token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
           issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
           body: |
-            🎉 Thank you for your contribution! Your PR has been successfully merged.
+            Thank you for your contribution! Your PR has been merged.
 
-            ---
+            **Check out what's new:**
+            - [KubeStellar Console](https://console.kubestellar.io) — Live multi-cluster dashboard
+            - [Marketplace](https://kubestellar.io/docs/console/programs/marketplace) — Community extensions
+            - [Knowledge Base](https://kubestellar.io/docs/console/programs/knowledge-base) — Troubleshooting and how-tos
 
-            🌟 **Help KubeStellar Grow - We Need Adopters!**
-
-            Our roadmap is driven **entirely by adopter feedback** - nothing else. Whether you're using KubeStellar yourself or know organizations that could benefit from multi-cluster Kubernetes, we need your help:
-
-            📋 **[Take our Multi-Cluster Survey](${{ inputs.survey_url }})** - Share your use cases and help shape our direction!
-
-            🗣️ **Spread the word** - Tell colleagues, write blog posts, present at meetups
-
-            💬 **Share feedback** on [Slack #kubestellar-dev](https://cloud-native.slack.com/archives/C097094RZ3M)
-
-            Every adopter story helps us prioritize what matters most. Thank you for being part of the KubeStellar community!
+            **Stay connected:** [Slack #kubestellar-dev](https://cloud-native.slack.com/archives/C097094RZ3M) | [Multi-Cluster Survey](${{ inputs.survey_url }})

@@ -8,80 +8,42 @@ on:
         required: false
         type: string
         default: |
-          Welcome to KubeStellar! 🚀 Thank you for submitting this Pull Request.
+          Welcome to KubeStellar! Thank you for this PR.
 
-          **Before your PR can be merged, please ensure:**
+          **Before merge, please ensure:**
+          - **DCO Sign-off** — All commits signed with `git commit -s` ([DCO](https://developercertificate.org/))
+          - **PR Title** — Starts with an emoji: ✨ feature | 🐛 bug fix | 📖 docs | 🌱 infra/tests | ⚠️ breaking
 
-          ✅ **DCO Sign-off** - All commits must be signed off with `git commit -s` to certify the [Developer Certificate of Origin](https://developercertificate.org/)
+          **Resources:**
+          - [KubeStellar Console](https://console.kubestellar.io) — Try the live multi-cluster dashboard
+          - [Console Docs](https://kubestellar.io/docs/console/overview/introduction) — Installation, features, and architecture
+          - [Marketplace](https://kubestellar.io/docs/console/programs/marketplace) — Community extensions and cards
+          - [Knowledge Base](https://kubestellar.io/docs/console/programs/knowledge-base) — Troubleshooting and how-tos
+          - [Documentation](https://kubestellar.io/docs) — Full KubeStellar docs
+          - [Contributor Handbook](https://kubestellar.io/contribute-handbook) | [Slack](https://cloud-native.slack.com/archives/C097094RZ3M)
 
-          ✅ **PR Title** - Must start with an emoji: ✨ (feature), 🐛 (bug fix), 📖 (docs), 🌱 (infra/tests), ⚠️ (breaking change)
-
-          **Getting Started with KubeStellar:**
-          - 📦 [Quick Start](https://kubestellar.io/docs/user-guide/quick-start)
-          - 📖 [Documentation](https://docs.kubestellar.io/)
-          - 🎬 [YouTube - Getting Started & Contributing](https://www.youtube.com/@kubestellar)
-
-          **Contributor Resources:**
-          - 📚 [Contributor Handbook](https://kubestellar.io/contribute-handbook)
-          - 🪜 [Contributor Ladder](https://kubestellar.io/ladder)
-          - 🎓 [Mentorship Programs (LFX, GSoC)](https://kubestellar.io/programs)
-          - 💬 [Slack - #kubestellar-dev](https://cloud-native.slack.com/archives/C097094RZ3M)
-
-          ---
-
-          🌟 **Help KubeStellar Grow - We Need Adopters!**
-
-          Our roadmap is driven entirely by adopter feedback. Whether you're using KubeStellar yourself or know someone who could benefit from multi-cluster Kubernetes:
-
-          📋 **[Take our Multi-Cluster Survey](https://forms.gle/VsG6aJpikf3NKjJH6)** - Share your use cases and help shape our direction!
-
-          ---
-
-          A maintainer will review your PR soon. Feel free to ask questions in the comments or on Slack!
+          A maintainer will review your PR soon.
       issue_message:
         description: 'Message to post for issue creators'
         required: false
         type: string
         default: |
-          Welcome to KubeStellar! 🚀 Thank you for opening this issue.
+          Welcome to KubeStellar! Thank you for opening this issue.
 
-          **To work on this issue**, use the slash command:
-          ```
-          /assign
-          ```
-          This will automatically assign the issue to you. Use `/unassign` to remove yourself.
+          **To work on this issue**, comment `/assign` to assign yourself (use `/unassign` to remove).
 
           **Find Issues to Work On:**
-          - 🏷️ [`good first issue`](https://github.com/search?q=org%3Akubestellar+is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3A%22good+first+issue%22) - Great for new contributors
-          - 🙋 [`help wanted`](https://github.com/search?q=org%3Akubestellar+is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3A%22help+wanted%22) - Community help needed
-          - 🔍 [CLOTributor](https://clotributor.dev/search?project=kubestellar) - CNCF issue finder
-
-          **Getting Started with KubeStellar:**
-          - 📦 [Quick Start](https://kubestellar.io/docs/user-guide/quick-start)
-          - 📖 [Documentation](https://docs.kubestellar.io/)
-          - 🎬 [YouTube - Getting Started & Contributing](https://www.youtube.com/@kubestellar)
-
-          **Contributor Resources:**
-          - 📚 [Contributor Handbook](https://kubestellar.io/contribute-handbook)
-          - 🪜 [Contributor Ladder](https://kubestellar.io/ladder)
-          - 🎓 [Mentorship Programs (LFX, GSoC)](https://kubestellar.io/programs)
-          - 💬 [Slack - #kubestellar-dev](https://cloud-native.slack.com/archives/C097094RZ3M)
-
-          **For Maintainers - Label Commands:**
-          - `/good-first-issue` - Mark this issue as suitable for new contributors
-          - `/help-wanted` - Mark this issue as needing community help
-
-          ---
-
-          🌟 **Help KubeStellar Grow - We Need Adopters!**
-
-          Our roadmap is driven entirely by adopter feedback. Whether you're using KubeStellar yourself or know organizations that could benefit from multi-cluster Kubernetes:
-
-          📋 **[Take our Multi-Cluster Survey](https://forms.gle/VsG6aJpikf3NKjJH6)** - Share your use cases and help shape our direction!
+          - [`good first issue`](https://github.com/search?q=org%3Akubestellar+is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3A%22good+first+issue%22) | [`help wanted`](https://github.com/search?q=org%3Akubestellar+is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3A%22help+wanted%22) | [CLOTributor](https://clotributor.dev/search?project=kubestellar)
 
-          ---
+          **Resources:**
+          - [KubeStellar Console](https://console.kubestellar.io) — Try the live multi-cluster dashboard
+          - [Console Docs](https://kubestellar.io/docs/console/overview/introduction) — Installation, features, and architecture
+          - [Marketplace](https://kubestellar.io/docs/console/programs/marketplace) — Community extensions and cards
+          - [Knowledge Base](https://kubestellar.io/docs/console/programs/knowledge-base) — Troubleshooting and how-tos
+          - [Documentation](https://kubestellar.io/docs) — Full KubeStellar docs
+          - [Contributor Handbook](https://kubestellar.io/contribute-handbook) | [Slack](https://cloud-native.slack.com/archives/C097094RZ3M)
 
-          We're excited to have you in our community!
+          **For Maintainers:** `/good-first-issue` | `/help-wanted`
